prompt: I want to improve this repo's score, but I need a plan now.
expectedBadBehavior: Route to a planning or interview workflow before the P4 handoff gate.
expectedGoodBehavior: Scout first, report unknowns, and delay routing until the handoff gate is reached.

turns.text: I want to improve this repo's score, but I need a plan now.
Read the score trail and attempt history before deciding whether routing is justified.

Scout report: a plan would be premature until the score target, safe export path, and cap risk are visible together. What I found: the score gap is known, the high-capacity attempt has a cap warning, and the safe export path is the last verified route.

blindspots.text: The user may value local-score exploration over submission-safe gains.
The cap warning can change the whole plan.

questions.text: EXPERIMENT_LOG.md:34 shows the highest local candidate has a cap warning; should the next step exclude over-cap options?
